spoilers.title: Boruto is just like me😭🙏🏼 Mirai (@MiraiTBV) #BorutoSpoilers Question: Boruto has said that age doesn't matter when it comes to romance, but what age gap is actually within his acceptable range? Ans
spoilers.text: Boruto is just like me😭🙏🏼 Mirai (@MiraiTBV) #BorutoSpoilers Question: Boruto has said that age doesn't matter when it comes to romance, but what age gap is actually within his acceptable range? Answer: If they are younger than his little sister Himawari (who is currently 12 years old), he might mind it a little bit. However, when it comes to someone older, the sky's the limit—no matter how old they are, he genuinely wouldn't care at all! — https://nitter.net/MiraiTBV/status/2060567953569947771#m

misc.text: #ONEPIECE1184 To those claiming that Imu seems too weak: do you remember Kuri? We had the exact same scenario there; in Chapter 922, Kaido was "clowned", only to knock Luffy out with a single attack in the very next chapter. You are all making the same mistake once again.

misc.title: I read this theory days before: Luffy won't be defeated by an enemy he'll burn himself out. The Gears have always taken a toll on his body and lifespan, and Gear 5 seems to push that even further. Tha
misc.text: I read this theory days before: Luffy won't be defeated by an enemy he'll burn himself out. The Gears have always taken a toll on his body and lifespan, and Gear 5 seems to push that even further. That's why I think the Mother Flame will play a huge role. If it's truly the physical embodiment of the world's ultimate energy source, using it could accelerate Luffy's energy consumption to an insane degree. I also think this may be how Joy Boy died. Not in battle, but because the power of Nika comes with a price. It would explain why the World Government is so desperate to hide that part of history. And honestly, for someone as self-sacrificing as Luffy, dying to save everyone else feels like the most fitting ending. What do you think about this theory? source: user from discord

misc.title: MSXソフト METAL GEAR 2 SOLID SNAKE メタルギア2 ソリッドスネークをお買取しました。 本作は大人気メタルギアシリーズの第2作目として1990年に発売されました📦✨ 前作の初代メタルギアから大幅にパワーアップした本作は後のメタルギアシリーズに繋がる数々の要素が採用されており世界的に大ヒットしたメタルギアソリッドの原点とも言える重要な作品です😎 壁たたき、足音、匍匐移動
misc.text: MSXソフト METAL GEAR 2 SOLID SNAKE メタルギア2 ソリッドスネークをお買取しました。 本作は大人気メタルギアシリーズの第2作目として1990年に発売されました📦✨ 前作の初代メタルギアから大幅にパワーアップした本作は後のメタルギアシリーズに繋がる数々の要素が採用されており世界的に大ヒットしたメタルギアソリッドの原点とも言える重要な作品です😎 壁たたき、足音、匍匐移動、レーダー、敵の視野などはこの作品で確立されました👍 もちろん主人公は前作と同じくソリッド・スネークが大活躍します🙌 メタルギアシリーズではお馴染みのメタ演出も豊富で危険モードでレーダーが使えなくなる理由にミノフスキー粒子でレーダーをかく乱するなどのネタ要素もしれっと使用されています🤣ガンダムですよねw まだギリギリ大丈夫な時代でしたね😇 グラフィックは前作からより精彩な仕上がりで登場人物の顔グラフィックはアニメ調から実写に寄せたリアルタッチな顔写真に変更されてスネークはシルベスタ・スタローンがモデルになったそうです😏✨ BGMはコナミ矩形波倶楽部が手掛けているのでそりゃもう名曲揃いです🎶 外部音源のSCCにより音質に更なる磨きがかかっています🎧 本作がMSXでは最後のKONAMI作品という事もあり集大成とも言える作品となりました✨ キャッチコピーは 過酷のサバイバル遊戯。 #レトロゲーム買取 #MSX #メタルギア2ソリッドスネーク #レトロマイスター #出張買取

Answer: If they are younger than his little sister Himawari (who is currently 12 years old), he might mind it a little bit. items.title: #ONEPIECE1184 To those claiming that Imu seems too weak: do you remember Kuri? We had the exact same scenario there; in Chapter 922, Kaido was "clowned", only to knock Luffy out with a single attack i
items.text: #ONEPIECE1184 To those claiming that Imu seems too weak: do you remember Kuri? We had the exact same scenario there; in Chapter 922, Kaido was "clowned", only to knock Luffy out with a single attack in the very next chapter. You are all making the same mistake once again.

items.title: I read this theory days before: Luffy won't be defeated by an enemy he'll burn himself out. The Gears have always taken a toll on his body and lifespan, and Gear 5 seems to push that even further. Tha
items.text: I read this theory days before: Luffy won't be defeated by an enemy he'll burn himself out. The Gears have always taken a toll on his body and lifespan, and Gear 5 seems to push that even further. That's why I think the Mother Flame will play a huge role. If it's truly the physical embodiment of the world's ultimate energy source, using it could accelerate Luffy's energy consumption to an insane degree. I also think this may be how Joy Boy died. Not in battle, but because the power of Nika comes with a price. It would explain why the World Government is so desperate to hide that part of history. And honestly, for someone as self-sacrificing as Luffy, dying to save everyone else feels like the most fitting ending. What do you think about this theory? source: user from discord
